mapper.select: SELECT owr_id, owr_password, owr_ty_cd, owr_nm, owr_bizrno, owr_ident_no, owr_cstm_idf_no, owr_email, owr_telno, owr_zip, owr_adres, owr_detail_adres, owr_use_yn, owr_regist_dt, owr_updt_dt, privacy_agree_yn, owr_corp_reg_no FROM owner WHERE owr_id = #{owrId}

SELECT broker_id, broker_ty_cd, broker_nm, broker_office_nm, broker_reg_no, broker_bizrno, broker_spclty_cd, broker_email, broker_telno, broker_zip, broker_adres, broker_detail_adres, broker_use_yn, broker_regist_dt, broker_updt_dt FROM broker

SELECT ir.ir_no, ir.ir_owr_id, ir.ir_broker_id, ir.ir_arrv_port_cd, ir.ir_tfg_no, ir.ir_status_cd, ir.ir_cstm_idf_no, ir.ir_corp_reg_no, ir.ir_arrv_schd_ymd, ir.ir_bl_awb_no, ir.ir_dclr_curr_cd, ir.ir_invc_amt, ir.ir_cn, ir.ir_dt, ir.ir_acpt_dt, ir.ir_use_yn, ir.ir_regist_dt, ir.ir_pay_mthd_cd, ir.ir_pay_type_cd, ir.ir_instl_pay_cnt, ir.ir_comment, br.broker_nm FROM imp_rqst ir LEFT JOIN broker br ON ir.ir_broker_id = br.broker_id WHERE ir.ir_owr_id = #{owrId} AND ir.ir_use_yn = 'Y'
AND ir.ir_no LIKE '%' || #{irNo} || '%'
AND ir.ir_status_cd = #{statusCd}
AND ir.ir_regist_dt >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ir.ir_regist_dt < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ir.ir_bl_awb_no LIKE '%' || #{blAwbNo} || '%'
AND br.broker_nm LIKE '%' || #{brokerNm} || '%'
AND ir.ir_cn LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY ir.ir_regist_dt DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM imp_rqst ir LEFT JOIN broker br ON ir.ir_broker_id = br.broker_id WHERE ir.ir_owr_id = #{owrId} AND ir.ir_use_yn = 'Y'
AND ir.ir_no LIKE '%' || #{irNo} || '%'
AND ir.ir_status_cd = #{statusCd}
AND ir.ir_regist_dt >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ir.ir_regist_dt < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ir.ir_bl_awb_no LIKE '%' || #{blAwbNo} || '%'
AND br.broker_nm LIKE '%' || #{brokerNm} || '%'
AND ir.ir_cn LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT port_cd, port_country_cd, port_nm, port_ag_cd, port_use_yn FROM port WHERE port_use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO imp_rqst( ir_no, ir_owr_id, ir_broker_id, ir_arrv_port_cd, ir_tfg_no, ir_status_cd, ir_cstm_idf_no, ir_corp_reg_no, ir_arrv_schd_ymd, ir_bl_awb_no, ir_dclr_curr_cd, ir_invc_amt, ir_cn, ir_dt, ir_use_yn, ir_regist_dt, ir_pay_mthd_cd, ir_pay_type_cd, ir_instl_pay_cnt, ir_comment )VALUES ( #{irNo}, #{irOwrId}, #{irBrokerId}, #{irArrvPortCd}, #{irTfgNo}, NVL(#{irStatusCd}, 'REQ'), #{irCstmIdfNo}, #{irCorpRegNo}, REPLACE(#{irArrvSchdYmd}, '-', ''), #{irBlAwbNo}, #{irDclrCurrCd}, #{irInvcAmt}, #{irCn}, SYSDATE, 'Y', SYSDATE, #{irPayMthdCd}, #{irPayTypeCd}, #{irInstlPayCnt}, #{irComment} )
mapper.select: SELECT ir_no, ir_owr_id, ir_broker_id, ir_arrv_port_cd, ir_tfg_no, ir_status_cd, ir_cstm_idf_no, ir_corp_reg_no, ir_arrv_schd_ymd, ir_bl_awb_no, ir_dclr_curr_cd, ir_invc_amt, ir_cn, ir_dt, ir_acpt_dt, ir_use_yn, ir_regist_dt, ir_pay_mthd_cd, ir_pay_type_cd, ir_instl_pay_cnt, ir_comment, br.broker_nm FROM imp_rqst ir left join broker br on(ir.ir_broker_id = br.broker_id) WHERE ir_no = #{irNo}

SELECT sr_no, sr_ref_biz_cd, sr_ref_no, sender_id, sender_ty_cd, receiver_id, receiver_ty_cd, sr_status_cd, sr_req_dt, sr_submit_dt, sr_appr_dt, sr_req_cn, sr_submit_cn FROM supp_rqst WHERE sr_ref_no = #{irNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE imp_rqst SET ir_arrv_port_cd = #{irArrvPortCd}, ir_arrv_schd_ymd = #{irArrvSchdYmd}, ir_bl_awb_no = #{irBlAwbNo}, ir_dclr_curr_cd = #{irDclrCurrCd}, ir_invc_amt = #{irInvcAmt}, ir_pay_mthd_cd = #{irPayMthdCd}, ir_pay_type_cd = #{irPayTypeCd}, ir_instl_pay_cnt = CASE WHEN #{irPayTypeCd} = 'INSTL' THEN #{irInstlPayCnt} ELSE NULL END, ir_comment = #{irComment} WHERE ir_no = #{irNo} AND ir_owr_id = #{irOwrId} AND ir_status_cd IN ('CSTM_REQ', 'CSTM_SUPP')
